what_it_is.headline: Treatment serum
what_it_is.body: A barrier-repair serum for over-sensitized or irritated skin, built around tamanu oil, niacinamide, and ceramides to calm the look of redness.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Formula angle
why_it_stands_out.body: A barrier-repair serum for over-sensitized or irritated skin, built around tamanu oil, niacinamide, and ceramides to calm the look of redness.

pairing_notes: Apply before moisturizer; follow with SPF if used in the morning.

manual_override.notes: Strict human QA override: the KraveBeauty draft was directionally correct but lacked compact card framing, so the rewrite gives it a clear barrier-serum highlight.

rows.notes: Search-only pilot case sampled from query historical_probe2_leftover (Skin1004).

what_it_is.headline: Prep or toner step
what_it_is.body: A mild exfoliating toner with fruit extracts, Madewhite™, and Niacinamide that gently refines and preps the skin for the next step in your skincare routine. Product Benefits: Soothing, Brightening, Skin Clarity, Dullness Reduction Skin Type: Normal, Dry, Combination Key.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Formula angle
why_it_stands_out.body: A mild exfoliating toner with fruit extracts, Madewhite™, and Niacinamide that gently refines and preps the skin for the next step in your skincare routine.

watchouts.label: May be too active for very sensitive or over-exfoliated skin.

manual_override.notes: Strict human QA override: the SKIN1004 toner kept an empty routine and noisy benefit string, so the rewrite makes the brightening toner role explicit.

what_it_is.headline: Brightening exfoliating toner
what_it_is.body: A mild exfoliating toner with fruit extracts, Madewhite, and niacinamide to refine texture and prep skin for the next routine step.

best_for.label: Skin needing a gentle refining toner step

why_it_stands_out.headline: Madewhite + niacinamide tone care
why_it_stands_out.body: Keeps the toner grounded around brightening and clarity support rather than a raw benefit list.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Fruit-extract exfoliating prep
why_it_stands_out.body: Frames it as a mild exfoliating toner that refines skin before serum or moisturizer.

pairing_notes: Use after cleansing before serum or moisturizer; start a few times weekly if skin is sensitive.

watchouts.label: Reduce frequency if skin feels sensitized or over-exfoliated.

layering_notes: Use after cleansing before serum or moisturizer.

what_it_is.headline: Daily moisturizer
what_it_is.body: Searching for an oil-free moisturizer that hydrates without feeling greasy or heavy on the skin? We've got it! ​ Go supersize and seal in instant hydration for longer.

why_it_stands_out.headline: Formula angle
why_it_stands_out.body: Searching for an oil-free moisturizer that hydrates without feeling greasy or heavy on the skin?

pairing_notes: Layer after watery treatments and before SPF in the daytime.

layering_notes: Usually layers after serums and before daytime SPF.
